seoTitle: Hampton City Schools Calendar 2026-2027: Holidays, Breaks, PDF & Important Dates
seoDescription: View the Hampton City Schools Calendar 2026-2027 in Virginia with first day, last day, holidays, winter break, spring break, exams, PDF, ICS download, and important dates.
calendarNotes: Hampton City Schools starts the 2026-2027 school year on August 24, 2026. Winter Break runs December 21-January 1, Spring Break runs April 5-9, and the last day of school is June 9, 2027. The calendar also lists teacher workdays, elementary planning days, progress reports, report cards, early release dates, high school exam schedules, and graduations.

customSections.label: About Hampton City Schools Calendar 2026-2027
customSections.content: The Hampton City Schools Calendar 2026-2027 is the districtwide academic calendar for students, families, teachers, and school staff in Hampton, Virginia. This calendar includes traditional school-year dates, student holidays, teacher workdays, elementary planning and professional development days, exam windows, early release dates, report card dates, and high school graduation dates. Families can use it to plan school attendance, childcare, appointments, vacations, transportation, and important activities during the school year.

customSections.label: Hampton City Schools 2026-2027 Calendar Highlights
customSections.content: The 2026-2027 Hampton City Schools calendar follows a traditional academic schedule with a late-August start, a January semester transition, spring break in April, and high school graduation activities after the final student day.

groups.label: What families should know
items: The first semester ends in January 2027 after the January high school exam window.
High school exam periods are listed in January and June, which can affect early release, transportation, and after-school planning.
Spring Break is scheduled for April 5-9, 2027.
Graduation activities are listed for June 10-12, 2027, after the final student day.
Teacher workdays and professional development days may affect childcare and transportation schedules even when they are not major school breaks.

customSections.label: Hampton City Schools School Breaks Summary
customSections.content: Use this quick summary for the major Hampton City Schools breaks most families search for during the 2026-2027 academic year.

rows: Short holiday break around Thanksgiving week
Longest scheduled student break in the first half of the year
Main spring travel and childcare planning period

customSections.label: Hampton City Schools Important Dates for Parents
customSections.content: These dates are the most useful planning checkpoints for Hampton families using the 2026-2027 school year calendar.

groups.label: Start and return dates
items: Students begin school on Monday, August 24, 2026.
Students return from Winter Break on Tuesday, January 5, 2027.
Second semester begins on Wednesday, January 27, 2027.

groups.label: Breaks and travel planning
items: Winter Break runs December 21, 2026 through January 1, 2027.
Spring Break runs April 5-9, 2027.
Families planning travel should confirm school-specific activities, athletics, and program calendars before making arrangements.

groups.label: Exams, graduation, and year-end dates
items: High school exam schedules run January 19-22, 2027 and June 4-9, 2027.
The last day of school is Wednesday, June 9, 2027.
High school graduations are listed for June 10-12, 2027.

customSections.label: 2025-2026 vs 2026-2027 Hampton Calendar Changes
customSections.content: Compared with the previous Hampton City Schools calendar, several major planning dates move one calendar day earlier in 2026-2027.

rows: Starts and ends one calendar day earlier
Starts and ends one calendar day earlier

customSections.label: How We Verify Hampton Calendar Information
customSections.content: MySchoolDates verifies Hampton City Schools calendar information before publishing this independent reference page.

groups.label: Verification process
items: Review the official Hampton City Schools calendar page and published PDF.
Compare key dates including first day, last day, holidays, winter break, spring break, teacher workdays, exam windows, and graduation dates.
Generate the downloadable ICS calendar file from verified calendar records.
Keep the official source link available so families can confirm district revisions or weather make-up changes.

customSections.label: Hampton Calendar Update History
customSections.content: This update history explains when the Hampton City Schools calendar record was reviewed for this page.

groups.label: Calendar record updates
items: July 20, 2026: Verified the 2026-2027 Hampton City Schools calendar against the official district calendar page and PDF.
July 20, 2026: Generated the downloadable ICS calendar file from the reviewed Hampton calendar records.
Future district revisions, weather make-up decisions, or school-specific schedule changes should be confirmed with Hampton City Schools.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Hampton City Schools start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Hampton City Schools starts school on Monday, August 24, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Hampton City Schools Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, April 5 through Friday, April 9, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Hampton in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Wednesday, June 9, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When are Hampton high school graduations in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The official calendar lists high school graduations on June 10-12, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: How many school days are in Hampton City Schools 2026-2027 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: The Hampton City Schools 2026-2027 calendar includes 180 instructional days for students.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Hampton City Schools have a fall break?
calendarFaqs.a: Hampton City Schools does not list a traditional fall break on the 2026-2027 calendar. The calendar does include teacher workdays, conference days, and holidays when students do not report.

calendarFaqs.q: When do Hampton City Schools students return after winter break?
calendarFaqs.a: Students return from Winter Break on Tuesday, January 5, 2027, after a teacher work day on Monday, January 4, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Hampton City Schools winter break 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Hampton City Schools Winter Break runs from Monday, December 21, 2026 through Friday, January 1, 2027. Students return on Tuesday, January 5, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: Is Hampton City Schools closed today?
calendarFaqs.a: This page lists planned Hampton City Schools calendar dates. For weather closures, emergency schedule changes, or same-day announcements, families should check the latest Hampton City Schools alerts and official school communications.
